body_txt: Plant Hair is when a character, usually a Plant Person , has leaves, vines, flowers, and other foliage-related paraphernalia instead of hair. It can be a Justified Trope , as having leaves on top of your head makes them less concealed from the sun, making photosynthesis easier. Most of the time, though, it’s purely for looks . Note that the character in question doesn't have to be a Plant Person . They just have to have foliage-related stuff instead of hair. Subtrope of Elemental Hair Composition . Compare Robot Hair and Alien Hair . See also Plant Person , Plant Aliens , and Planimal , who usually have this. Sometimes occurs in Weird Beard form.
